name: Canned Rabbit Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water to your liking.
2. When the vegetables are soft, have canning jars ready.
3. Fill each jar with the prepared mixture.
4. Add 1 teaspoon salt to each jar and process in a boiling water bath for 90 minutes (or use a pressure cooker for 3 hours).
5. Makes about 25 quarts.
